name: meldr
description: Workspace management tool for multi-repo projects with git worktrees and tmux integration. Written in Rust (edition 2024, requires 1.88+).

layers.label: Entry
layers.description: CLI entry point and argument routing

layers.label: CLI
layers.description: Clap-based command handlers — one file per command

layers.label: Core
layers.description: Business logic — workspace, config, worktree, state

layers.label: Git
layers.description: GitOps trait — RealGit uses subprocess git CLI (no libgit2)

layers.label: Tmux
layers.description: TmuxOps trait — RealTmux with 3 layout presets

nodes.label: main.rs
nodes.description: Arg rewriting (swaps reversed action/resource patterns like 'meldr add worktree' to 'meldr worktree add') then routes to CLI handlers. Builds EffectiveConfig before every command.

nodes.label: cli/init.rs
nodes.description: Creates meldr.toml and .meldr/state.json in the current directory.

nodes.label: cli/create.rs
nodes.description: One-shot workspace creation: init + package add + optional worktree add.

nodes.label: cli/sync.rs
nodes.description: Sync worktree branches with upstream (fetch + rebase/merge) with snapshot-based undo.

nodes.label: cli/status.rs
nodes.description: Renders a color-coded dashboard of git status across all packages and worktrees.

nodes.label: cli/exec.rs
nodes.description: Runs a command in every package worktree directory for the current branch.

nodes.label: cli/pr.rs
nodes.description: Creates and shows status of coordinated PRs across packages.

nodes.label: cli/config_cmd.rs
nodes.description: Get/set/unset config values at workspace or global (~/.meldr/config.toml) scope.

nodes.label: core/workspace.rs
nodes.description: Parses meldr.toml manifest. Resolves package list, finds workspace root, detects current worktree from cwd.

nodes.label: core/config.rs
nodes.description: 5-layer config resolution: CLI flags > env vars > workspace toml > global toml > built-in defaults. Produces EffectiveConfig passed to every handler.

nodes.label: core/worktree.rs
nodes.description: ~2100 lines. Main business logic: worktree create/remove, sync with conflict detection, parallel fetch via Rayon, tmux window setup.

nodes.label: core/state.rs
nodes.description: Manages .meldr/state.json — tracks active worktrees, sync metadata, timestamps.

nodes.label: core/sync_history.rs
nodes.description: Saves pre-sync snapshots to .meldr/sync-snapshots/ for undo without git reflog complexity.

nodes.label: core/filter.rs
nodes.description: PackageFilter: applies --only, --exclude, --group flags. Used by most commands.

nodes.label: core/claude_prune.rs
nodes.description: Archives and purges Claude Code session state when a worktree is removed.

nodes.label: git/ (GitOps)
nodes.description: GitOps trait abstracts all git operations. RealGit uses subprocess calls to the git CLI. Key ops: bare clone, worktree add/remove, fetch, rebase/merge, conflict detection via git merge-tree --write-tree (Git 2.38+).

nodes.label: tmux/ (TmuxOps)
nodes.description: TmuxOps trait abstracts tmux. Three presets: default 9-pane (3 claude top + 6 terminals in 2/3+1/3 split), minimal 2-pane, editor-only. Custom layouts via template variables.

flows.label: meldr worktree add <branch>
flows.description: Create coordinated git worktrees across all packages and open a tmux window with AI agent panes.

steps.label: Arg rewriting + config
steps.detail: Detects reversed patterns. Builds EffectiveConfig via 5-layer resolution.

steps.label: cli/worktree.rs::add()
steps.detail: Resolves PackageFilter (--only/--exclude/--group) and leader package. Delegates to core.

steps.label: Manifest::load()
steps.detail: Reads meldr.toml — package list, git URLs, workspace settings.

steps.label: WorkspaceState::load()
steps.detail: Reads .meldr/state.json. Verifies no duplicate branch exists.

steps.label: fetch() parallel (Rayon)
steps.detail: Fetches origin for each package in parallel using Rayon thread pool.

steps.label: worktree_add() sequential
steps.detail: git worktree add worktrees/<branch>/<pkg>/ per package, sequentially for state consistency.

steps.label: state.add_worktree()
steps.detail: Records new worktree in state.json: branch name, package paths, creation timestamp.

steps.label: create_window()
steps.detail: mode=full: 9-pane (3 claude top + 6 terminals 2/3+1/3). minimal: 2-pane. editor-only: 1-pane. Launches agent in leader package.

flows.label: meldr sync [--all]
flows.description: Fetch and rebase/merge branches with upstream. Pre-sync snapshot enables lossless undo.

steps.label: Resolve branch target
steps.detail: Detects branch from cwd, explicit arg, or all branches with --all.

steps.label: cli/sync.rs::run()
steps.detail: Passes branch list, strategy, and --merge flag to core.

steps.label: save_snapshot()
steps.detail: Saves current HEAD refs to .meldr/sync-snapshots/<branch>-<timestamp>/ before any changes.

steps.label: fetch() parallel
steps.detail: git fetch origin for all packages in parallel via Rayon.

steps.label: merge-tree conflict check
steps.detail: strategy=safe: git merge-tree --write-tree detects conflicts before rebasing. Aborts cleanly if conflicts — no state changed.

steps.label: rebase or merge
steps.detail: git rebase origin/<branch> (or git merge if --merge). Strategy: -X theirs / -X ours for non-safe modes.

steps.label: update_sync_info()
steps.detail: Updates state.json with last-sync timestamp and ahead/behind commit counts.

flows.label: meldr create <name> -r <url>
flows.description: One-shot workspace creation: init, clone packages as bare repos, and optionally create a worktree.

steps.label: Route to create
steps.detail: Reads --agent override if provided. Merges into EffectiveConfig.

steps.label: cli/create.rs::run()
steps.detail: Orchestrates three sub-operations sequentially.

steps.label: init workspace
steps.detail: Creates <name>/meldr.toml and <name>/.meldr/state.json.

steps.label: git clone --bare
steps.detail: Bare-clones each -r URL into packages/<pkg>/. Bare clones allow multiple worktrees without branch switching.

steps.label: register packages
steps.detail: Writes [[package]] entries to meldr.toml for each cloned repo.

steps.label: create_worktrees() if -b
steps.detail: Only runs if -b <branch> provided. Full worktree add + tmux setup flow.

steps.label: tmux window (if -b)
steps.detail: Opens workspace in tmux with AI agent panes if branch was specified.

flows.label: meldr worktree remove <branch>
flows.description: Remove worktrees after checking dirty state, pruning Claude session data, and cleaning up tmux.

steps.label: cli/worktree.rs::remove()
steps.detail: Auto-detects branch from cwd if not specified. Reads --force and --no-claude-prune flags.

steps.label: dirty-state check
steps.detail: git status per package. Aborts if uncommitted changes and not --force.

steps.label: claude_prune() if enabled
steps.detail: Archives and purges Claude Code session state for this worktree. Disable with --no-claude-prune.

steps.label: git worktree remove
steps.detail: git worktree remove worktrees/<branch>/<pkg>/ per package.

steps.label: state.remove_worktree()
steps.detail: Removes branch entry from .meldr/state.json.

steps.label: kill tmux window
steps.detail: Kills the tmux window for this branch if one exists.

flows.label: meldr status
flows.description: Color-coded dashboard of git status across all packages and active worktrees.

steps.label: cli/status.rs::run()
steps.detail: Applies PackageFilter. Delegates staleness check to core.

steps.label: Manifest::load()
steps.detail: Gets package list from meldr.toml.

steps.label: WorkspaceState::load()
steps.detail: Gets active worktrees and last-sync info.

steps.label: check_worktree_staleness()
steps.detail: Parallel Rayon fetch + git rev-list to count ahead/behind commits per package x branch.

steps.label: git status --short
steps.detail: Per-package dirty-file detection.

flows.label: meldr exec <command>
flows.description: Run a shell command in every package worktree directory for the current branch.

steps.label: cli/exec.rs::run()
steps.detail: Detects current branch from cwd. Applies PackageFilter.

steps.label: find worktree dirs
steps.detail: Looks up worktree paths from state.json for the current branch.

steps.label: apply PackageFilter
steps.detail: Filters by --only, --exclude, --group. Spawns command per package with stdout prefixed by pkg name.

agents.custom: Defined in ~/.meldr/config.toml under [agents.<name>] with a 'command' key
